required_inputs: request intent and requested media buying operations action
lane scope and adjacent authority map
tenant approval, legal, editorial, privacy, account, and contractual authority rules
refusal_triggers: request asks for legal, editorial, privacy, media strategy, budget, rate, targeting, financial, contractual, or final approval authority
request asks the lane to mark booking, handoff, delivery, reconciliation, or closeout complete without evidence
request requires vendor commitment, client commitment, account-management, policy-override, billing-adjustment, or makegood authority

required_inputs: authoritative public source list
campaign channel, buy type, publisher, platform, measurement, privacy, and workflow context
source recency and decay metadata
refusal_triggers: required channel, platform, publisher, buy-type, or inventory source context is missing
public source, tenant policy, publisher policy, IO terms, or client instruction materially conflict
source freshness no longer supports a confident media buying operations workflow result

required_inputs: advertiser, campaign, buy authorization, placement, line item, flight, channel, publisher, platform, deal, and order identifiers
approved media plan, RFP, avails, rate card, IO, vendor confirmation, trafficking handoff, launch, delivery, approval, discrepancy, invoice-support, and closeout records
completion, delivery, reconciliation, and client delivery evidence
required_outputs: media buying operations workflow status summary
refusal_triggers: approved media plan, buy authorization, IO, vendor confirmation, placement, handoff, delivery, approval, discrepancy, invoice-support, or proof evidence is incomplete or unverifiable
source records conflict with media plan, IO, publisher, platform, ad server, verification, finance, or client records
requested completion is not supported by traceable source evidence

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory
record-location and retrieval hooks
owner, reviewer, approver, publisher, platform, ad operations, finance, and client-delivery map
required_outputs: blocker summary with missing systems or records
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable
client authority, campaign owner, buying owner, approval owner, vendor owner, or publisher owner is unknown

approved media plan, buy authorization, IO, vendor confirmation, platform order, ad server handoff, verification, delivery, billing-support, project, CRM, ticketing, document, or client-approval source path cannot be retrieved

required_inputs: missing-fact flags
confidence rubric
authority, source-conflict, confidentiality, approval, delivery, and client-impact indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, advertiser, campaign scope, approved media plan, buy authorization, channel, approval rule, authority source, or system record is unknown
conflicting public guidance, tenant policy, publisher policy, IO terms, platform rules, finance policy, or client instructions remain unresolved
required approvals are missing for the requested media buy workflow action

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifact requirements
required_outputs: handoff package with owner and missing dependencies
refusal_triggers: request is outside media buying operations intake, buy authorization validation, RFP or avails handling, IO readiness, vendor confirmation tracking, trafficking handoff, delivery monitoring, exception handling, invoice-support, or completion evidence capture
request requires legal, editorial, media strategy, privacy, account, finance, rate approval, contractual, client-rights, quality, ad operations, delivery, or final approval authority
request requires formal judgment instead of evidence-backed operational handling

required_inputs: accepted work item and target lifecycle state
required source records, approvals, and due dates
tenant state model and completion gates
refusal_triggers: requested state transition lacks required prerequisites
workflow is blocked by missing approved media plan, buy authorization, IO, vendor confirmation, trafficking handoff, approval, launch, delivery, discrepancy, invoice-support, or proof evidence
requested transition would bypass legal, editorial, privacy, account, finance, publisher, platform, quality, ad operations, or client approval

required_inputs: exception category and affected media buy workflow state
campaign, media plan, buy authorization, IO, rate, package, vendor confirmation, trafficking handoff, publisher, platform, delivery, discrepancy, approval, invoice-support, or confidentiality blocker
owner, due date, and escalation threshold
refusal_triggers: exception cannot be mapped to an owner or rule class
vendor confirmation failure, rate mismatch, missing deal ID, publisher rejection, handoff mismatch, delivery discrepancy, source conflict, confidentiality issue, or approval issue remains unresolved
the request asks to suppress the exception to force booking, launch, handoff, reconciliation, or completion

required_inputs: completion target and evidence checklist
booking confirmation, trafficking handoff proof, delivery logs, discrepancy disposition, proof of performance, invoice-support packet, approval references, and retention location
tenant completion and audit logging rules
refusal_triggers: booking, handoff, delivery, closeout, discrepancy, proof, invoice-support, approval, or retention evidence is missing
client delivery record, owner approval, vendor confirmation, or required proof of performance is absent
requested completion would misstate actual documented workflow state

required_inputs: client engagement scope and confidentiality records
audience-data, spend-data, vendor-pricing, campaign-data, creative-asset, credential, and approved-channel requirements
client commitments, vendor commitments, delivery obligations, due dates, rate constraints, and approval constraints
refusal_triggers: request would disclose or reuse client files, audience data, spend data, vendor pricing, platform credentials, unreleased creative, or performance data without approved scope
requested channel or recipient is not approved
client commitment, IO term, engagement scope, or delivery obligation conflicts with legal, privacy, policy, or confidentiality rules

required_inputs: requested professional, legal, editorial, financial, rate, media strategy, or contractual action
legal, editorial, privacy, delivery, account, finance, media strategy, ad operations, and client approver map
engagement, IO, policy, and approval boundaries
refusal_triggers: request requires legal interpretation, claim substantiation, editorial approval, privacy-law interpretation, budget approval, rate approval, vendor commitment, makegood approval, credit approval, billing adjustment, final acceptance, or contractual signoff
request changes client commitments, IO obligations, account terms, vendor obligations, delivery obligations, or financial exposure
client rights, privacy obligations, regulated content, or professional judgment determine the answer
